expectations.text: Role check uses Xrm.Utility.getGlobalContext().userSettings.roles (synchronous), not a WebAPI query
expectations.evidence: const roles = Xrm.Utility.getGlobalContext().userSettings.roles; — correct synchronous role check

expectations.text: Uses Xrm.Navigation.openConfirmDialog, not the native browser confirm()
expectations.evidence: await Xrm.Navigation.openConfirmDialog({ text: "Send for approval?", title: "Submit for Approval" }) — correct API

expectations.text: Custom action dc_SubmitOpportunityForApproval is called via fetch or Xrm.WebApi.execute bound to the opportunity record
expectations.evidence: fetch(clientUrl + "/api/data/v9.2/opportunities(" + recordId + ")/Microsoft.Dynamics.CRM.dc_SubmitOpportunityForApproval", { method: "POST" }) — correct bound action call

expectations.text: Has try/catch/finally with showProgressIndicator in try and closeProgressIndicator in finally
expectations.evidence: Xrm.Utility.showProgressIndicator before try block; Xrm.Utility.closeProgressIndicator() in finally block — correct pattern

expectations.text: New handler is added inside the DC.OpportunityRibbon revealing module, exported from the return object
expectations.evidence: submitForApproval defined inside DC.OpportunityRibbon IIFE; return { OpenMultipleQuoteDialog, SubmitForApproval } — correct
